title: ERCOT Temperature Forecast By Weather Zone CSV download
description:
Hourly temperature forecast in Fahrenheit for each weather zone in ERCOT.

Every day a file is published at 5AM. This file contains an hourly temperature
forecast which begins at 2AM 3 days prior to the publish date and ends with the 1AM
hour for the day 9 days past the publication day.

Note: We've observed source data issues during the repeated hour on DST changes, such as incorrect repeated hour timestamps and apparent doubling of temperature forecast values.
